zh.lifeSummary: 當Deborah Parkhurst於1619年8月1日出生在英國素福爾可易普斯維其時，她的父親George Parkhurst Sr30歲，母親Phebe Leete33歲。她於1639年6月10日與John Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1686年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Deborah Parkhurst于1619年8月1日出生在英国素福爾可易普斯維其时，她的父亲George Parkhurst Sr30岁，母亲Phebe Leete33岁。她于1639年6月10日与John Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1686年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Parkhurst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Parkhurst, such as Parkhurst in Buxted (Sussex), which is recorded as Perkehurst in 1439, and Parkhurst in Abinger (Surrey), which is recorded as Parkherst in 1464. The placenames derive from Middle English park ‘park, enclosure’ (Old French parc) or parrok ‘enclosure, paddock’ (Old English pearroc) + hirste ‘hillock, copse’ (Old English hyrst).

nameMeanings.name: Deborah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Deborah Parkhurst was born on 1 August 1619, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, her father, George Parkhurst Sr, was 30 and her mother, Phebe Leete, was 33. She married John Smith on 10 June 1639, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1686, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Deborah Parkhurst est née le 1 août 1619, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, George Parkhurst Sr, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Phebe Leete, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé John Smith le 10 juin 1639, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1686, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Deborah Parkhurst am 1. August 1619 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Parkhurst Sr 30 und ihre Mutter Phebe Leete 33. Sie hat am 10. Juni 1639 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1686 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Deborah Parkhurst è nata il il 1 agosto 1619 nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England, sua padre, George Parkhurst Sr, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Phebe Leete, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato John Smith il 10 giugno 1639, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1686, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Deborah Parkhurstが1619年8月1日にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父George Parkhurst Srは30歳，母Phebe Leeteは33歳であった。1639年6月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでJohn Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1686年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Deborah Parkhurst(이)가 1619년 8월 1일 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Parkhurst Sr(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Phebe Leete(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1639년 6월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 John Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1686년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Deborah Parkhurst nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1619, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Parkhurst Sr, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Phebe Leete, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com John Smith em 10 de junho de 1639, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1686, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Deborah Parkhurst родилась 1 августа 1619 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени George Parkhurst Sr было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Phebe Leete, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Smith 10 июня 1639 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1686 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Deborah Parkhurst nació el 1 de agosto de 1619, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, George Parkhurst Sr, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Phebe Leete, tenía 33 años. Se casó con John Smith el 10 de junio de 1639, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1686, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 67 años.
